The TFA 14.1509.01 GRILL BRATEN offers a backlit display and sensor touch buttons, a stainless steel sensor, a magnet, a stand and a 1 m long cable. The digital puncture thermometer allows measurements from - 30 to + 300 °C. With this device, you will always have the meat under control and perfectly cooked. Operates on two AAA batteries.
